channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Left equipment, 5th June
item.description:
JB riney have left equipment on the callers road blocking drives and traffice, caller advises they have been left in a very dangerous postion and are impeading traffic outside 12 Cockmannings Rd, Orpington
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cockmannings Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 5th June
item.description:
Yet again people too lazy to get rid of their rubbish legally. The last lot of fly tipping was only cleared a couple of days ago. This is a continual problem. The rubbish is normally cleared swiftly but there is no deterrent from it happening again. What is the council doing to stop this from happening?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Headcorn Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken support on young tree which is now leaning., 5th June
item.description:
Young tree is leaning sideways since the support was broken. When strong winds the tree is moving rapidly, concerned it will eventually break. There is a second tree next to it that also has broken support but isn't leaning, yet.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Kevington Drive, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping every other day. THIS NEEDS MONITORING., 5th June
item.description:
I’ve reported this multiple times in the past. This is an ongoing issue which appears to be happening every other day. It’s blocking the footpath & there is always glass on the floor here too where I walk my dog. Please put up a camera, this needs monitoring.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Between 2 Donaldson Road and car park next foor, 5th June
item.description:
Random container left

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Illegal advertising on street lamp posts, 5th June
item.description:
It makes our local area look awful and there are 4 or 5 of them on Brownspring Drive and Dominic Drive. They are not allowed to advertise like this.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Domonic Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This vehicle was delivered from a vehicle carruer, has had two men spend the day trying to remove the steering wheel & has had its doors left open all day, 5th June
item.description:
Two men keep driving by and trying to remove the steering Wheel.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Domonic Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish around the garages, 5th June
item.description:
Rubbish outside the garages and overfilled bins leading to rubbish all down the street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 356, Camberwell Station Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights on round about, 5th June
item.description:
Not working again - top of west Hallowes near 35, 37 and 39
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Hallowes, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Payment caving in collapsing in our basement, 5th June
item.description:
Tfl done these pavements outside our premises but its sinking in and down and will collapse into our basement very soon we reported this 2 years but nothing done it's dangerous now people are trippin g over this and not realising then it's going down and down our basement ceiling will cave in soon this doesn't look clear in the pictures needs to be seen in person it's lop sided now we are scared and unable to put table or chairs out there please help before something terrible happens Rain and water is comming through terribly and our ceiling basement will cave in that pavement section needs to rent done as urgently as possible please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Harleyford Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees causing obstruction, 5th June
item.description:
The trees on main avenue are overgrown and causing visibility hazards for drivers joining Main Avenue from adjoining roads.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Main Avenue, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harvist, 5th June
item.description:
Fly tippimg

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: By electricity box, 5th June
item.description:
Dumped rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ash Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 29 Lancaster Grove, 5th June
item.description:
Despite this being changed to fixed by the council a few months ago, there are still big puddles collecting here whenever it rains.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Lancaster Grove, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Intersection of Strathray Gardens and Eton Avenue, 5th June
item.description:
Damaged utility box cover

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Strathray Gardens, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of 27 Burton Rd, 5th June
item.description:
Someone has dumped rubbish in front of 27 Burton Road. This is not from the tenants in our building. The rubbish includes old carpet, big yoghurt buckets, etc

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Rubbish bag left on Beatty Road, 5th June
item.description:
Self explanatory

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 5th June
item.description:
There is a car with no number plates on the road opposite the girls school among the white vans that are constantly being worked on. I suspect he is running a business with the amount of vehicles that are coming and going all the time.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Floathaven Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car at The Oaks estate, 5th June
item.description:
Since a month or two, there's an abandoned car in the small car park next to The Oaks building in Plumstead. It has obviously been in an accident (the bonnet is very dented) and now the rear left tyre is flat.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Oaks, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish left on pavement in front of 15 Sladedale Road., 5th June
item.description:
About 8 white rubbish bags have been left for about 2 weeks. Other rubbbish has been taken away but these bags remain
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sladedale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
